summary: P1 Supplier Onboarding UX — ALL TESTS PASSED. Backend: 25/25 pytest tests passed. Frontend: Dashboard, Wizard, Credential Form, Health Check, Certification, Go-Live panels all working correctly.

issues: Minor: Dashboard cards may not immediately reflect status changes after wizard completion due to query cache - user needs to refresh or navigate away/back

critical_code_review_comments: supplier_onboarding_service.py: Well-structured with clear 6-step onboarding lifecycle, proper credential encryption via Fernet
All 6 suppliers correctly defined in SUPPLIER_REGISTRY with their credential_fields metadata
Health check (4 checks) and certification (6 steps) properly simulate realistic API responses
GO_LIVE_THRESHOLD = 80 enforced correctly - suppliers need 80%+ score to activate production traffic
SupplierOnboardingPage.jsx: Complete UI with all data-testid attributes for testing, proper step indicator, and form components
seed_data_creation: None required - simulation mode generates test data for health checks and certifications
context_for_next_testing_agent: P1 Supplier Onboarding complete. All 8 API endpoints working. Dashboard shows 6 suppliers (ratehawk, paximum, tbo, wwtatil, hotelbeds, juniper). Hotelbeds successfully onboarded via Playwright test (certified with 100% score). All supplier APIs are SIMULATED/MOCKED.

GET /api/supplier-onboarding/registry.details: Returns 6 suppliers with code, name, description, product_types, credential_fields, sandbox_url, docs_url

GET /api/supplier-onboarding/dashboard.details: Returns all suppliers with status (not_started/credentials_saved/health_check_passed/certified/live), go_live_threshold=80

GET /api/supplier-onboarding/detail/{sup.details: Returns full onboarding info with credentials_preview (masked), health_check, certification, go_live status

POST /api/supplier-onboarding/credential.details: Saves encrypted credentials, returns status=credentials_saved, validates required fields

POST /api/supplier-onboarding/validate/{.details: Runs 4 health checks (credential_valid, api_reachable, rate_limit_ok, search_endpoint), returns overall pass/fail + score

POST /api/supplier-onboarding/certify/{s.details: Runs 6 certification steps (search, detail, revalidation, booking, status, cancel), returns score + go_live_eligible

GET /api/supplier-onboarding/certificati.details: Returns latest certification report with test_run_id, results, score, go_live_eligible

POST /api/supplier-onboarding/go-live/{s.details: Toggles go-live (requires 80%+ score), returns status=live/certified, go_live boolean

Frontend: Dashboard Page.details: 6 supplier cards in grid, KPI cards (total/live/certified/in-progress), click opens wizard

Frontend: Supplier Wizard.details: Step indicator with 6 steps, back button, dynamic content based on onboarding status

Frontend: Credential Form.details: Dynamic fields based on supplier (e.g., Hotelbeds: base_url, api_key, secret), save button

Frontend: Health Check Panel.details: Run button, 4 check results (credential_valid, api_reachable, rate_limit_ok, search_endpoint), rerun button

Frontend: Certification Panel.details: Run button, 6 step results, score bar, go-live eligibility badge

Frontend: Go-Live Panel.details: Score display, 6/6 tests passed, EVET (eligible), toggle button

Auth Required.details: All endpoints return 401/403/422 without authentication, requires admin/super_admin role

mocked_apis_list: Health check: credential_valid, api_reachable, rate_limit_ok, search_endpoint — all simulated
Certification: search, detail, revalidation, booking, status, cancel — all simulated with realistic messages
mocked_apis.note: Backend runs in simulation mode. All health checks and certification tests return simulated pass results. No real supplier API calls are made.

supplier_registry_verified.ratehawk: code, name, description, product_types=[hotel], 3 credential fields (base_url, key_id, api_key)
supplier_registry_verified.paximum: code, name, description, product_types=[hotel,transfer,activity], 4 credential fields (base_url, username, password, agency_code)
supplier_registry_verified.tbo: code, name, description, product_types=[hotel,flight,tour], 4 credential fields (base_url, username, password, client_id)
supplier_registry_verified.wwtatil: code, name, description, product_types=[tour], 5 credential fields (base_url, application_secret_key, username, password, agency_id)
supplier_registry_verified.hotelbeds: code, name, description, product_types=[hotel], 3 credential fields (base_url, api_key, secret)
supplier_registry_verified.juniper: code, name, description, product_types=[hotel,tour], 3 credential fields (base_url, username, password)

go_live_threshold_verified.enforcement: Verified - go-live requires 80%+ certification score, tested with both eligible (100%) and ineligible (no certification) scenarios
